# VeritasESG

> AI-enhanced forensic accounting tool that detects greenwashing and irregularities in Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) and ESG reports using semantic analysis, machine learning, and anomaly detection.

VeritasESG lets auditors, regulators, and analysts upload a CSR/ESG report (PDF or text) or enter a company name and receive a forensic credibility score, risk level, flagged passages, quantitative anomalies, and external-context contradictions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, the three pillars of analysis, and how it works.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to analyze reports.
